message:
Running command: 
# EXCELLENT! DRT is at iteration 60 with only 2 violations remaining!
# Violations trend: 150663 → 81164 → 75748 → 11934 → 2428 → ... → 4 → 2
# DRT is CONVERGING beautifully! Should complete very soon.
# 
# The pipe drainer is working. Let me monitor for completion.

RUN_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"

# Poll every 30s for completion
for i in $(seq 1 20); do
    sleep 30
    echo "=== Check $i: $(date) ==="
    # Drain pipe continuously
    dd if=/proc/956480/fd/11 bs=4096 count=64 >> /tmp/pipe_extra.log 2>/dev/null
    tail -10 /tmp/pipe_extra.log
    echo "---"
    ls "$RUN_DIR/final/" 2>/dev/null && echo "=== FINAL! ===" && break
    ls "$RUN_DIR/70-openroad-detailedrouting/" | grep -v "^config\|^COMMANDS\|^_env\|^state" | tail -5
    ORPID=$(ps aux | grep openroad | grep -v grep | awk '{print $2}' | head -1)
    [ -z "$ORPID" ] && echo "=== OpenROAD exited ===" && break
    ps aux | grep "^user.*openroad" | grep -v grep | awk '{print "CPU:"$3"%","TIME:"$10}'
done
